asset_name: Menotropins / Human Menopausal Gonadotropin Product Family
status: P1 EVIDENCE CLOSURE WAVE 6 / BIOLOGIC OR MIXTURE IDENTITY BLOCK ACTIVE / NOT PLATINUM CERTIFIED
classification: Urinary-derived follicle-stimulating and luteinising gonadotropin mixture biologic
mechanism_summary: Combined follicle-stimulating hormone and luteinising-hormone bioactivity supporting follicular development and reproductive treatment.
evidence_maturity: Established authorised fertility evidence; composition, purification, FSH/LH activity and product-specific indications vary.
regulatory_headline: AUTHORISED FERTILITY PRODUCT CONTEXTS EXIST / COMPOSITION- AND PRODUCT-SPECIFIC
certification_blockers: Exact product composition and FSH/LH activity
closure_class: URINARY GONADOTROPIN MIXTURE / FSH-LH BIOACTIVITY AND PURIFICATION
closure_state: PARTIAL CLOSURE — CURRENT MENOPUR LABEL AND EXACT 75 IU FSH / 75 IU LH-ACTIVITY PRODUCT CONTEXT IDENTIFIED; G75 SOURCE, COMPOSITION, POTENCY AND EQUIVALENCE OPEN
authoritative_product_boundary: MENOPUR is an exact prescription menotropins product with 75 IU FSH and 75 IU LH activity per vial, a defined manufacturer, formulation and assisted-reproduction label. The supplier G75 listing does not establish MENOPUR identity, the same urinary source, purification, FSH/LH ratio, potency assay or authorised use.
critical_closure_controls: G75 is not assumed to be MENOPUR
75 IU does not prove 75 IU FSH plus 75 IU LH activity
OHSS, thrombosis, ovarian torsion and multiple-gestation risks retained
No fertility, dosing, injection or reconstitution protocol
